entries.title: Import session index or host admin surface.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/migration-assistant in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews import sessions and their current migration state.

entries.title: Import validation summary.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/migration-assistant in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An operator reviews validation errors and warnings before executing an import.

entries.title: Recovery page imports.
entries.notes: Show recovery-center page import validation, relation resolution, execution state, and rollback reporting.
entries.useCase: An operator imports pages through Recovery Center and reviews validation, relation resolution, execution, and rollback state.

entries.title: Relation resolution review.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/migration-assistant in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An operator maps imported references to existing Capell records before execution.

entries.title: Rollback report view.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/migration-assistant in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An operator reviews what rollback changed and what manual cleanup remains.

entries.title: Package export intent screen.
entries.notes: Capture after installing capell-app/migration-assistant in the isolated demo harness and seeding the data required for this use case.
entries.useCase: An operator prepares an export package and confirms included resources before download.
